page.title: What would you like to see built? Write it down.
page.subtitle: Drop ideas for software / web / mini-programs you wish existed — productivity tools, or fun projects to play with and learn from. I'll pick interesting ones to help build.

perks.build: I'll help with the interesting ones

detail.notFound: This idea doesn't exist or isn't public yet.
detail.loadError: Failed to load — try again later.

modal.title: Submit a new idea
modal.bodyHint: Markdown is supported — headings, lists, code blocks, all welcome.

form.title: Title
form.titlePlaceholder: One sentence: what's the pain point?
form.bodyPlaceholder: Be specific: what problem, in what context? What do you do about it now? What would the ideal experience look like?
form.backgroundPlaceholder: Your field / job — helps me understand the use case
form.contactPlaceholder: Email / WeChat — only used for follow-ups, never shown publicly
form.submittedDesc: I'll review before showing it publicly. If you left contact info and I pick yours, I'll reach out.

errors.rate: Slow down a bit — too many submissions in a short time.
errors.validation: Missing or malformed fields. Please double-check.
errors.unknown: Submission failed. Try again in a moment.

list.heading: Public ideas
list.empty: Be the first to drop an idea.

comments.rateLimited: Slow down — too many comments in a short time.

floats.submitAttentionDesc: Click to drop it here — Markdown supported
floats.askAttentionDesc: I've read every doc and can look at screenshots — click to chat
floats.askDisclaimer: Answers come from the official docs and may be wrong. For critical decisions, double-check on GitHub.
floats.welcomeDesc: Try one of these common questions — I'll pull from the docs and stream the answer back.

samples.firstTime: How do I set things up the first time?
samples.proxy: Why am I seeing 502s? Any proxy fix?
samples.generic: How do I configure a generic provider?

floats.rateLimited: Slow down — too many questions per minute.
floats.poweredBy: AI-generated content may be inaccurate. Model: Xiaomi MiMo
floats.attachHint: Paste / drag / click to upload a config screenshot — the AI will look at it.
floats.attachLimit: Up to 4 images, auto-resized to 1280px / JPEG.
